variants: Altair Figueroa currently resides in Gardenstone Hollow, having been born in Fenneldusk Borough. His innovative spirit is highlighted by his creation of the Hyperlayer Translation Model, which is recognized for its impact in the technological landscape. This remarkable achievement earned him the prestigious Raindrop Sprig Merit. When not working on his inventions, Altair enjoys being a member of the Cedarveil Pipeplayers, where he immerses himself in musical pursuits and community engagement.
